title: Remote Control Cars – 2.4GHz High-Speed RC Car for Kids, 15KM/H+ 2WD Off-Road Car with 2 Rechargeable Batteries, Electric Remote Control Truck Toy for Boys & Girls Gifts (Green)
features: 🚗 High-Speed & Powerful Performance – Equipped with a strong motor and 2 x 3.7V 500mAh rechargeable batteries, this RC car reaches speeds of 15KM/H+, delivering a thrilling racing experience.

🎮 2.4GHz Remote Control & Easy Handling – Enjoy precise steering with the 2.4GHz anti-interference radio system, ensuring stable signal transmission and an extended 80ft control range, allows multiple cars to be played with simultaneously without interference. Perfect for beginners and hobbyists alike!

🏎️ Sturdy & All-Terrain Ready – Designed with anti-slip tyres, this off-road remote control cars handles grass, gravel, dirt, and pavements effortlessly. The robust chassis and shockproof build make it impact-resistant.
🔋 Extended Playtime with Dual Batteries – The RC truck includes two rechargeable batteries, allowing for 30+ minutes of uninterrupted fun. Quick and easy USB charging keeps the adventure going!
💦 Water-Resistant Design for More Adventure – No need to worry about puddles! This splash-proof remote control car handles wet conditions and even sprays water for extra excitement.

🎁 Perfect Gift for Kids & RC Enthusiasts – The remote control cars for kids age 3+ is an ideal Christmas or birthday gift for boys and girls who love high-speed racing and off-road challenges. Comes in an exquisite gift box for a premium feel!
